'''âd-z-d-z''' ('''kadazdezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monosyllabize|monosyllabize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monosyllabize|monosyllabize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-z-d-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadazdezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
